title: Hermes Agent just reached Fable level… Mixture Of Agents
summary: David Ondrej demonstrates Hermes Agent integrated with a Mixture of Agents approach to run AI agents, claiming the combination reaches Fable-level performance. The video provides resources for implementing this agent-based system.
writeup: David Ondrej demonstrates Hermes Agent combined with a Mixture of Agents approach for running AI agents, claiming the pairing reaches what he calls Fable-level performance. The video walks through the agent-based setup and provides resources for implementing it. The central takeaway is that layering a Mixture of Agents method onto Hermes Agent is presented as the source of the performance gain.
